summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Jobflow v2.0 with all 6 phases successfully implemented. Backend APIs working at 91.9% success rate (34/37 tests), frontend UI integration fully functional with all expected features present.

minor_notes.impact: Expected behavior - Interview Prep feature removed in Phase 1
Expected behavior - no test notifications exist

passed_tests: ✅ PHASE 1: Interview Prep completely removed from right panel and API
✅ PHASE 2: UK Sponsorship checker with 140K+ records, fuzzy matching, auto-check on job creation
✅ PHASE 2: Deloitte job shows green 'Sponsors visas' badge, SomeRandomCo shows 'not_found'
✅ PHASE 3: Company Intelligence panel redesigned with all 6 sections (header, links, intel, people, activity, CV match)
✅ PHASE 3: Shows 'No ATS check yet' prompt instead of 0% when no analysis run
✅ PHASE 4: NotificationBell in topbar with dropdown functionality, backend APIs working
✅ PHASE 5: ATS results persistence (save/load/update APIs working, auto-load on return)
✅ PHASE 6: Cover letter inline editor with 4 tone options, save draft, copy, download, word count
✅ All existing features working: Jobs CRUD, Contacts, CV upload, AI parsing, Gmail integration
✅ Auth system working correctly with session management
✅ Auto-sponsorship check triggers on job creation and populates badge
✅ Company Intelligence panel fully interactive with edit functionality
✅ ATS Checker page loads correctly with input panel and cover letter tab
✅ Cover letter editor shows existing content with paragraph-level editing capability

success_percentage.backend: 91.9% (34/37 tests passed - 3 expected 404s for removed features)
success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all 6 phases working correctly with proper UI integration)
